name: Continue
description: Server has received the request headers and client should proceed

name: Switching Protocols
description: Server is switching protocols as requested by client

name: Processing
description: Server has received and is processing the request (WebDAV)

name: Early Hints
description: Server is sending early headers while main response is being prepared

name: OK
description: Standard success response

name: Created
description: Resource created successfully

name: Accepted
description: Request accepted but not yet completed

name: No Content
description: Request succeeded but no content to return

name: Moved Permanently
description: Resource permanently moved to new URL

name: Found
description: Resource temporarily at a different URL

name: Not Modified
description: Resource not modified since last request (caching)

name: Temporary Redirect
description: Temporary redirect, method must not change

name: Permanent Redirect
description: Permanent redirect, method must not change

name: Bad Request
description: Request could not be understood by server

name: Unauthorized
description: Authentication required

name: Payment Required
description: Payment is required to access the resource (x402 protocol)

name: Forbidden
description: Server understood but refuses to authorize

name: Not Found
description: Resource not found on server

name: Method Not Allowed
description: HTTP method not supported for this resource

name: Request Timeout
description: Server timed out waiting for request

name: Conflict
description: Request conflicts with current state

name: Gone
description: Resource permanently deleted

name: Unprocessable Entity
description: Request semantic errors (WebDAV)

name: Too Many Requests
description: Rate limit exceeded

name: Internal Server Error
description: Generic server error

name: Bad Gateway
description: Upstream server returned invalid response

name: Service Unavailable
description: Server temporarily overloaded or down

name: Gateway Timeout
description: Upstream server did not respond in time
